Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The plants seem much livelier than they did when we started.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Do you suppose... they're happy that you are tending to them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Fascinating... There's no data on this, but it seems like you understand them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Hello, plants. I will be tending to you as well this time. Don't worry, I'll make sure to decrease my pressure output.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 21 1 10}But if anything starts hurting, just raise your left hand... Or rather, your left leaf.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}However, some reports suggest that plants grow better when you speak to them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Could it be that they have some sort of ability that we aren't yet aware of?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hello, hello. This is Aigis. If you can hear me, plants, then please respond.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Unfortunately, there was no answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Communication will be difficult with my current abilities. This is something to consider for the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I had some prior knowledge of "plants," but this was my first time observing them directly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}These little seeds and buds in the earth can morph and change so quickly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Is this proof that they are living as well? How fascinating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I would like to watch these plants grow and document this experience for my records.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}I will tend to them with my full power![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}This took more time than I'd anticipated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I will need to run more simulations to ensure there are no delays next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's gotten late. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}The plants look much livelier now compared to before they were tended to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Do you think... they're happy you're taking care of them, -san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Yes, you handle them so delicately, it's clear that you care about them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'm sure the plants know how much work you're putting in for them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'll do the best I can to make them happy too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}They say talking to plants can help them grow, don't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Do you think... maybe these plants have a heart as well, but we just aren't aware of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}...It would be nice if that were possible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I wonder... Maybe these plants have a heart as well, but we just aren't aware of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}If we keep tending to them, will we understand them better?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Looking at them like this really makes me think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}These plants are just like you and the others. They're living, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I want to see them grow with my own eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}So I'm going to do everything in my power to care for them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 21 7 11}I'm sorry. This was my first time doing this, so I think I slowed you down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I'll keep training in my room so that I can work faster next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Thank you for your help. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}There appears to be less damage from pests than the data in my predictions suggests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}We haven't taken any specific measures against them. What is the cause of this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Look, -san! I've sighted a ladybug larva! It's very small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}This must be the reason why they've been growing so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Agreed. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}That would explain why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}You don't look so well. You don't have to worry about it biting you though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I will move it to another leaf then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, -san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}My apologies, I got distracted. Let's keep working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Excuse me, -san. Please apply the repellant on that end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. No problems to report.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}That concludes our mission for today. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}There isn't as much damage from pests as I was expecting. That's a relief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}But we haven't taken any special measures. What's going on...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Look, -san! There's a ladybug larva! It's so small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}Yes. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}I'm sorry. Are you uncomfortable with insects? I'll move it to another leaf.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, -san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}Sorry, I got distracted. Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}It may be rude to interfere, but we can't let them ruin our harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 87 0 0}Let's give the ladybug some assistance this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 89 0 0}That should be enough for today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The plants seem much livelier than they did when we started.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Do you suppose... they're happy that you are tending to them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Fascinating... There's no data on this, but it seems like you understand them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Hello, plants. I will be tending to you as well this time. Don't worry, I'll make sure to decrease my pressure output.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 21 1 10}But if anything starts hurting, just raise your left hand... Or rather, your left leaf.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}However, some reports suggest that plants grow better when you speak to them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Could it be that they have some sort of ability that we aren't yet aware of?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hello, hello. This is Aigis. If you can hear me, plants, then please respond.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Unfortunately, there was no answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Communication will be difficult with my current abilities. This is something to consider for the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I had some prior knowledge of "plants," but this was my first time observing them directly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}These little seeds and buds in the earth can morph and change so quickly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Is this proof that they are living as well? How fascinating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I would like to watch these plants grow and document this experience for my records.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}I will tend to them with my full power![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}This took more time than I'd anticipated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I will need to run more simulations to ensure there are no delays next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's gotten late. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}The plants look much livelier now compared to before they were tended to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Do you think... they're happy you're taking care of them, -san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Yes, you handle them so delicately, it's clear that you care about them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'm sure the plants know how much work you're putting in for them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'll do the best I can to make them happy too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}They say talking to plants can help them grow, don't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Do you think... maybe these plants have a heart as well, but we just aren't aware of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}...It would be nice if that were possible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I wonder... Maybe these plants have a heart as well, but we just aren't aware of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}If we keep tending to them, will we understand them better?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Looking at them like this really makes me think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}These plants are just like you and the others. They're living, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I want to see them grow with my own eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}So I'm going to do everything in my power to care for them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 21 7 11}I'm sorry. This was my first time doing this, so I think I slowed you down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I'll keep training in my room so that I can work faster next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Thank you for your help. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}There appears to be less damage from pests than the data in my predictions suggests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}We haven't taken any specific measures against them. What is the cause of this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Look, -san! I've sighted a ladybug larva! It's very small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}This must the reason why they've been growing so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Agreed. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}That would explain why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}You don't look so well. You don't have to worry about it biting you though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I will move it to another leaf then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, -san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}My apologies, I got distracted. Let's keep working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Excuse me, -san. Please apply the repellant on that end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. No problems to report.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}That concludes our mission for today. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}There isn't as much damage from pests as I was expecting. That's a relief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}But we haven't taken any special measures. What's going on...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Look, -san! There's a ladybug larva! It's so small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}Yes. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}I'm sorry. Are you uncomfortable with insects? I'll move it to another leaf.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, -san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}Sorry, I got distracted. Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}It may be rude to interfere, but we can't let them ruin our harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 87 0 0}Let's give the ladybug some assistance this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 89 0 0}That should be enough for today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_247_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The plants seem much livelier than they did when we started.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_248_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Do you suppose... they're happy that you are tending to them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_252_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Fascinating... There's no data on this, but it seems like you understand them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Hello, plants. I will be tending to you as well this time. Don't worry, I'll make sure to decrease my pressure output.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 21 1 10}But if anything starts hurting, just raise your left hand... Or rather, your left leaf.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}However, some reports suggest that plants grow better when you speak to them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Could it be that they have some sort of ability that we aren't yet aware of?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_259_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hello, hello. This is Aigis. If you can hear me, plants, then please respond.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Unfortunately, there was no answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Communication will be difficult with my current abilities. This is something to consider for the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_263_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I had some prior knowledge of "plants," but this was my first time observing them directly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}These little seeds and buds in the earth can morph and change so quickly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Is this proof that they are living as well? How fascinating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_265_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I would like to watch these plants grow and document this experience for my records.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}I will tend to them with my full power![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_267_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_269_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}This took more time than I'd anticipated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I will need to run more simulations to ensure there are no delays next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_270_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_271_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's gotten late. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_277_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}The plants look much livelier now compared to before they were tended to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_278_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Do you think... they're happy you're taking care of them, -san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_282_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Yes, you handle them so delicately, it's clear that you care about them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'm sure the plants know how much work you're putting in for them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'll do the best I can to make them happy too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_285_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}They say talking to plants can help them grow, don't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Do you think... maybe these plants have a heart as well, but we just aren't aware of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_288_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}...It would be nice if that were possible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I wonder... Maybe these plants have a heart as well, but we just aren't aware of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}If we keep tending to them, will we understand them better?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_292_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Looking at them like this really makes me think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}These plants are just like you and the others. They're living, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_294_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I want to see them grow with my own eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}So I'm going to do everything in my power to care for them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_296_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_298_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 21 7 11}I'm sorry. This was my first time doing this, so I think I slowed you down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I'll keep training in my room so that I can work faster next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_299_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_300_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Thank you for your help. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_305_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}There appears to be less damage from pests than the data in my predictions suggests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}We haven't taken any specific measures against them. What is the cause of this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_307_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Look, -san! I've sighted a ladybug larva! It's very small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_311_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}This must the reason why they've been growing so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_313_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Agreed. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}That would explain why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_318_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}You don't look so well. You don't have to worry about it biting you though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I will move it to another leaf then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, -san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_323_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_324_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}My apologies, I got distracted. Let's keep working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_326_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_328_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Excuse me, -san. Please apply the repellant on that end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_329_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_330_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. No problems to report.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}That concludes our mission for today. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_332_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}There isn't as much damage from pests as I was expecting. That's a relief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}But we haven't taken any special measures. What's going on...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_335_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Look, -san! There's a ladybug larva! It's so small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_339_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_342_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}Yes. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_346_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}I'm sorry. Are you uncomfortable with insects? I'll move it to another leaf.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, -san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_351_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_352_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}Sorry, I got distracted. Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_354_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_356_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}It may be rude to interfere, but we can't let them ruin our harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 87 0 0}Let's give the ladybug some assistance this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_357_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_358_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 89 0 0}That should be enough for today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}
